programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep105: Whale Sharks…Gentle Giants
programme.desc: Whale Sharks, gentle giants of the sea, can reach nearly 50 feet in length and weigh over 30 tons! With space age technology, researchers can identify, catalogue and track individual sharks. In Mexico and Western Australia, whale shark tourism has proven to be both a blessing and a curse. Also featured is the remarkable story of the capture and transport of whale sharks to the Georgia Aquarium in Atlanta.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep103: Philippines
programme.desc: It started as an adventure to Cloud 9 for a surfing contest that turns into a cultural expedition and full-blown typhoon chasing surf trip to the northern regions and secret surf breaks of the Philippines. Creed McTaggart, Kaimana Jaquias, Mitch Parkinson, Soli Bailey and Noa Deane score some of the best waves imaginable in the crystal waters of Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Treasure Coast Fishing
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy fishes the offshore and inshore waters in the Sunrise City of Ft. Pierce, Florida. Joining him is Scott Locke of AmeraTrail and Captain Eric Davis.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the first episode of season three of Surviving Mann in the books, it’s time to dissect and analyze. Host Chris Heaven kicks off episode one of Aftermath by taking a look into the contestants' mental headspace during the grueling first day. Contestant and three-time olympian Lanny Barnes recounts the first day under Coach Mann and how it stacks up to his training in the past.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen kicks off Wild Shots with a coast-to-coast deep dive into American gun culture. From the first colonial settlement to Capitol Hill, he explores the origins of the Second Amendment and the modern fight to protect it. Along the way, he teams up with top firearms experts and puts iconic weapons to the test—including a brutal challenge to see just how many rounds it takes to break an AR-15.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen teams up with SEAL Team 6 legend Don Mann to tackle real-world defense tactics and home-clearing techniques. A visit to Civil War battlefields connects history to modern freedoms, while the brutal 5-Year AR Challenge pushes an AR-15 through 10,000 rounds without cleaning. Will the rifle survive—or fail under fire?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with challenges, adventure and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before season 2 arrives, we have a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants will face off against 3 special operations veterans in a 48-hour no-sleep battle of endurance and willpower. Starting with a kayak, portage and run challenge, it’s time to discover if these top contestants are worthy of the name All-Stars.

programme.title: A Journey Through Europe
programme.desc: “A Journey through Europe” features the photography and cinematography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This 60 minute video is a relaxing and inspiring visual voyage through some of the most scenic regions of Europe. Countries featured include France, Italy, Sweden, England, Spain, and Greece. This video includes a beautiful instrumental soundtrack.

programme.title: Sequoia and Kings Canyon National Parks
programme.desc: This lush, cinematic journey immerses you in the majesty of Kings Canyon and Sequoia National Parks, where ancient Sequoia giants tower overhead, their massive trunks bathed in dappled light. Gentle rivers meander through verdant forests, leading to serene waterfalls whose soft cascades offer a soothing, meditative ambiance. The crisp, snowy high‑Sierra peaks in the distance add a stunning alpine contrast that evokes calm and wonder. Altogether, the film crafts a tranquil escape into natures beauty—perfect for relaxation, reflection, or simply drifting off into nature’s embrace. This 90 minute film is available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Preview for Rainforest Relaxation
programme.desc: Relax in the soothing greens of the rainforest in our newest release "Rainforest Relaxation". Clear creeks flow amongst the ancient ferns, and moss covered trees create intriguing forms and texture in this 45 minute nature film featuring the beauty of the Hoh rainforest in Olympic National Park. Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv on November 13, 2021.

programme.title: Preview of Framed Matted Art Displays
programme.desc: This is a preview of a series of 15 of Elizabeth Carmels Fine Art Photographs matted like framed art pieces.The full 2 1/2 hour film displays each photograph for 10 minutes. To remain on one photograph press pause, follow the directions in our video "Displaying Fine Art Photographs on Your Apple TV and Roku. This display is shown on a Samsung Frame TV with a Burlwood Frame available at www.TheCarmelGallery.com

programme.title: Preview for "Coastal Odysssey"
programme.desc: Soar over the Northern California Coast and experience dramatic sea cliffs, sea arches, waterfalls and crashing waves in "Coastal Odyssey". This is a preview of the 1 hour film that is available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.
